videos.headline: Kane makes Bundesliga history as Bayern keeps up Leverkusen chase
videos.title: Kane makes Bundesliga history as Bayern keeps up Leverkusen chase
videos.caption: Harry Kane sets the record for most goals in a debut Bundesliga season as Bayern Munich eases past Darmstadt 5-2.
